title: ToolTreaux Mini Router Bits Set for Rotary Tools Heat Treated Carbon Steel 10pc
description:
The ToolTreaux mini router bits kit comes with 6 different shapes for a variety of uses with dremel and rotary tools: trim, V groove, straight, cove, slot cutter and beading. These mini router bits are ideal for detailed precision work like building model trains and planes, dollhouse furniture and more. All of the included router bits feature a 1/8 inch shank that is compatible with most dremel and rotary tools. Easily insert them into your mini-grinding tool. They are made of durable heat-treated carbon steel for superior strength that will ensure a long service life. Our set of drill router bits come with a stylish, convenient wooden storage case to keep them organized and secured when not in use. Easily store your drill bits with your other hobby tools and crafting supplies

ToolTreaux Mini Router Bits Set for Rotary Tools Heat Treated Carbon Steel 10pc

The ToolTreaux mini router bits kit comes with 6 different shapes for a variety of uses with dremel and rotary tools: trim, V groove, straight, cove, slot cutter and beading. These mini router bits are ideal for detailed precision work like building model trains and planes, dollhouse furniture and more.

Key Features

  • 6 MINI ROUTER BIT SHAPES - ToolTreaux 10pc mini router bits set comes with 6 different shapes for a variety of uses: straight, trim, V groove, beading, cove and slot cutter; Ideal for detailed work like building model trains and planes, dollhouse furniture and mini buildings
  • 1/8 INCH SHANK - All included router bits feature 1/8“ (3mm) shank that fits most rotary tools; easily insert into mini-grinding tools; 1.5” length; compatible with most standard rotary and dremel tools
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Mini router bits are made of high-quality heat-treated carbon steel for superior strength and durability to ensure a long service life
  • WOODEN STORAGE CASE INCLUDED - Set of router bits comes with convenient wooden storage case to keep tools organized and secured when not in use; easily store your bits with other hobby tools and crafting supplies
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Number of pieces: 10; Materials: heat-treated carbon steel, wood; Storage case included: Shank size: 1/8“ (3mm); Dimensions of storage case: 4” x 4” x 1”

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TT10PCROUTST
  • UPC: 810058489388
  • Color: Chrome
  • Size: Medium

All of the included router bits feature a 1/8 inch shank that is compatible with most dremel and rotary tools. Easily insert them into your mini-grinding tool. They are made of durable heat-treated carbon steel for superior strength that will ensure a long service life.

Our set of drill router bits come with a stylish, convenient wooden storage case to keep them organized and secured when not in use. Easily store your drill bits with your other hobby tools and crafting supplies. This is a must-have set of drill bits for dremel and rotary tool owners!
